svg.title: AiKhbar System Architecture
svg.desc: Full-stack Urdu broadcast media analysis system showing frontend, backend, AI/ML, and data layers with their connections.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Urdu news sources does AiKhbar scrape?')
g.text: BBC Urdu · Daily Jang · Express · ARY · HUM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What pages does the AiKhbar frontend have?')
g.text: Home · News · Story · Bulletin · Ask AiKhbar · About
